top_signals.title: Accredited official statistics: GDP deflators at market prices, and money GDP June 2026 (Quarterly National Accounts)
top_signals.summary: This document contains the latest gross domestic product (GDP) deflators. The GDP deflator can be viewed as a measure of general inflation in the domestic economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Kuwait Wants Consortiums to Bid for $7 Billion Oil Pipeline Deal
top_signals.summary: Kuwait’s state oil firm, Kuwait Petroleum Corporation (KPC), has asked some of the asset management funds bidding for a stake in its oil pipeline network to tap other investors in their bids for the planned sale estimated at $7 billion, anonymous sources familiar with the process told Reuters on Thursday. Early this year, it emerged that KPC is considering following in the footsteps of its Saudi and Abu Dhabi peers by tapping major international infrastructure investors to buy a stake in its oil pipeline network. KPC held initial talks with…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Corporate report: Whole of Government Accounts 2025 to 2026: guidance for preparers
top_signals.summary: Guidance for central government and local government preparers for Whole of Government Accounts.

top_signals.title: British Columbia mining hampered by DRIPA ‘confusion’
top_signals.summary: In June, BC’s Supreme Court lifted an injunction that had temporarily restricted construction activities pending resolution of a judicial review.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Hudbay gains Peru approval to further increase Constancia mill throughput
top_signals.summary: The new permit increases the Constancia mill's processing capacity from 31 million tonnes per annum (mtpa) to 34 mtpa.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
